mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pur_receipt_detail WHERE receipt_id = #{receiptId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY line_no

SELECT d.price FROM pur_receipt_detail d JOIN pur_receipt b ON b.id = d.receipt_id WHERE b.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND d.product_id = #{productId} AND b.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.bill_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id AS detail_id, d.product_id AS productId, d.product_code AS productCode, d.product_name AS productName, d.spec AS spec, d.unit_id AS unitId, d.unit_name AS unitName, d.batch_no AS batchNo, d.qty AS qty, d.price AS price, d.tax_rate AS taxRate, d.remark AS remark, b.bill_no AS billNo, b.bill_date AS billDate FROM pur_receipt_detail d JOIN pur_receipt b ON b.id = d.receipt_id WHERE b.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND b.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.bill_date DESC, b.id DESC LIMIT 50
